## Summary

Governance-first canon update based on the Sister forensic pipeline audit. Establishes the doctrinal authority for PRs 2 (Handoff Gate) and 3 (Self-Correction Policy).

**Core additions:**

1. **Runtime Doctrine #11–13** — "No malformed rec reaches author", evidence ownership boundary, prose quality gate at every LLM output point
2. **`S06b_HANDOFF_GATE`** — new SIPOC stage contract: deterministic prose quality gate between Pass 1/2 output and Pass 3 synthesis (sentence completeness, scaffold residue, broken modals, generic language, missing evidence anchors)
3. **`S11b_DOWNLOAD_PIPELINE`** — split from `S11_RENDERER`: sanitizer → parity gate → PDF/DOCX/TXT with evidence ownership preservation
4. **Recommendation Integrity Gate** added to `S07_PASS3` output acceptance metrics
5. **III.PL5 + III.PL6** — new Pipeline Law rules in Volume III (Prose Quality Gate Rule + Evidence Ownership Rule)
6. **Two new Operating Rules** — "Recommendation Integrity & Prose Quality" + "Evidence Ownership Boundary"
7. **Forensic map** — `docs/forensics/SISTER_FORENSIC_PIPELINE_MAP.md`: 16-stage trace of Sister through entire pipeline

**Key governance changes in SIPOC:**
- Short-form Review Gate bypass risk explicitly documented
- Pass 4 / QualityGateV2 naming clarified with cross-reference note
- 5 new metric contracts (download evidence preservation, download parity, recommendation prose quality, handoff prose completeness)
- 8 new failure codes (HANDOFF_*, DOWNLOAD_*, REC_INTEGRITY_*)
- Certification Status Matrix updated for `S06b`, `S11a`, `S11b`

This is docs-only — no code changes. PR 2 will implement the handoff gate code; PR 3 will implement the self-correction policy.
